hero.location: Abades, Arico · South Tenerife · Canary Islands
hero.title: Abades Ocean Deck House
hero.subtitle: Your private coastal retreat with stunning ocean views, steps from crystal-clear waters perfect for snorkeling and diving in one of Tenerife's hidden gems.

about.subtitle: Welcome to your escape
about.title: A Home Where the Ocean Meets Your Doorstep
about.description: Abades Ocean Deck House is a beautifully designed holiday home nestled in the tranquil coastal village of Abades, in the municipality of Arico, South Tenerife. With its spacious ocean-view deck, modern amenities, and proximity to pristine beaches, it's the perfect base for exploring one of the Canary Islands' best-kept secrets.
